name: completions
Speech: Time
Speech: Specific Weather
Speech: Cancelling Override
Chore Format
func:
msg.timestamp = Date.now() / 1000
const chore = msg.slots.name.split('.')[1]
const glob = global.get(chore)
const globOverdue = `${chore}.attributes.overdue`
msg.overdue = global.get(globOverdue)
msg.counter = `counter.${chore}`
return msg;

name: Speech: Checking Off Chore
func:
msg.payload = `Checking off ${msg.payload}`
return msg;

name: Speech: Change Temperature
Light Data
func:
msg.brightness = msg.raw_text.match(/\d+/g)[0]
return msg;

name: Speech: Distiller Time Left
Speech: Stock Left
func:
const stock = msg.stock
const name = msg.slots.name
const stock_items = {
    'sensor.dishsoap_stock': { singular: 'container of dish soap', plural: 'containers of dish soap' },
    'sensor.handsoap_stock': { singular: 'container of hand soap', plural: 'containers of hand soap' },
    'sensor.bodywash_stock': { singular: 'container of body wash', plural: 'containers of body wash' },
    'sensor.facewash_stock': { singular: 'container of face wash', plural: 'containers of face wash' },
    'sensor.shampoo_stock': { singular: 'container of shampoo', plural: 'containers of shampoo' },
    'sensor.garbagebag_stock': { singular: 'garbage bag', plural: 'garbage bags' },
    'sensor.papertowel_stock': { singular: 'roll of paper towels', plural: 'rolls of paper towels' },
    'sensor.tissue_stock': { singular: 'box of tissues', plural: 'boxes of tissues' },
    'sensor.toiletpaper_stock': { singular: 'roll of toilet paper', plural: 'rolls of toilet paper' },
}

msg.payload = stock == 0
    ? `You're out of ${stock_items[name].plural}`
    : stock == 1
        ? `You have one ${stock_items[name].singular} left`
        : `You have ${stock} ${stock_items[name].plural} left`;

return msg;

name: Speech: Chore Last Done
Speech: Chore Time Until
func:
var overdue = parseInt(msg.overdue)
msg.test = overdue
const string0 = {
    'input_datetime.3dprinterfilters': 'replacing the 3 D printer filters',
    'input_datetime.cleankitchen': 'cleaning the kitchen',
    'input_datetime.cleanjongwaterbottle': 'cleaning jongs water bottle',
    'input_datetime.acfilters': 'replacing the a c filters',
    'input_datetime.emptycleanvacuum': 'changing ecovacs water',
    'input_datetime.changepillowcases': 'changing the pillow cases',
    'input_datetime.replacesponge': 'replacing the sponge',
    'input_datetime.vacuuming': 'vacuuming',
    'input_datetime.changekitchentowel': 'changing the kitchen towel',
    'input_datetime.cleandishrack': 'cleaning the dishrack',
    'input_datetime.cleanmicrowave': 'cleaning the microwave',
    'input_datetime.mopping': 'mopping',
    'input_datetime.replacetoothbrushhead': 'replacing the toothbrush heads',
    'input_datetime.cleantrashcan': 'cleaning the trash can',
    'input_datetime.cleanlivingroomtable': 'cleaning the living room table',
    'input_datetime.cleantoothbrushes': 'cleaning the toothbrushes',
    'input_datetime.changesheets': 'changing the sheets',
    'input_datetime.empty_ecovac': 'emptying ecovacs dustbin',
    'input_datetime.changebathtowel': 'changing the bath towel',
    'input_datetime.cleanwindowsills': 'cleaning the window sills',
    'input_datetime.change_slippers': 'changing the slippers',
    'input_datetime.cleanmirrorbathroom': 'cleaning the bathroom',
    'input_datetime.cleancouch': 'cleaning the couch',
    'input_datetime.laundry': 'doing the laundry',
    'input_datetime.cleancecewaterbottle': 'cleaning ceces water bottle',
    'input_datetime.dusting': 'dusting',
    'input_datetime.cleanhumidifier': 'cleaning the humidifier',
    'input_datetime.cleanstove': 'cleaning the stove',
    'input_datetime.washbathmat': 'washing the bathmat',
    'input_datetime.replacemothcakes': 'replacing the moth cakes',
    'input_datetime.reorganizecloset': 'reorganizing your clothes',
}
if (overdue < -1) {
    msg.payload = `You have ${overdue*-1} days until ${string0[msg.slots.name]} is due`
}
else if (overdue == -1) {
    msg.payload = `${string0[msg.slots.name]} is due tomorrow`
}
else if (overdue == 0) {
    msg.payload = `${string0[msg.slots.name]} is due today`
}
else if (overdue == 1) {
    msg.payload = `${string0[msg.slots.name]} was due yesterday`
}
else if (overdue == 1) {
    msg.payload = `${string0[msg.slots.name]} is one day overdue`
}
else if (overdue > 1) {
    msg.payload = `${string0[msg.slots.name]} is ${overdue} days overdue`
}
return msg;

func:
const string0 = {
    'input_datetime.3dprinterfilters': 'replacing the 3 D printer filters',
    'input_datetime.cleankitchen': 'cleaning the kitchen',
    'input_datetime.cleanjongwaterbottle': 'cleaning jongs water bottle',

    'input_datetime.changekitchentowel': 'changing the kitchen towel',
    'input_datetime.cleandishrack': 'cleaning the dishrack',
    'input_datetime.cleanmicrowave': 'cleaning the microwave',
    'input_datetime.mopping': 'mopping',
    'input_datetime.replacetoothbrushhead': 'replacing the toothbrush heads',
    'input_datetime.cleantrashcan': 'cleaning the trash can',
    'input_datetime.cleanlivingroomtable': 'cleaning the living room table',
    'input_datetime.cleantoothbrushes': 'cleaning the toothbrushes',
    'input_datetime.changesheets': 'changing the sheets',
    'input_datetime.empty_ecovac': 'emptying ecovacs dustbin',
    'input_datetime.changebathtowel': 'changing the bath towel',
    'input_datetime.cleanwindowsills': 'cleaning the window sills',
    'input_datetime.change_slippers': 'changing the slippers',
    'input_datetime.cleanmirrorbathroom': 'cleaning the bathroom',
    'input_datetime.cleancouch': 'cleaning the couch',
    'input_datetime.laundry': 'doing the laundry',
    'input_datetime.cleancecewaterbottle': 'cleaning ceces water bottle',
    'input_datetime.dusting': 'dusting',
    'input_datetime.cleanhumidifier': 'cleaning the humidifier',
    'input_datetime.cleanstove': 'cleaning the stove',
    'input_datetime.washbathmat': 'washing the bathmat',
    'input_datetime.replacemothcakes': 'replacing the moth cakes',
    'input_datetime.reorganizecloset': 'reorganizing your clothes',
}
let string1, string2, overdue
if (msg.slots.name == 'input_datetime.changepillowcases') {
    string1 = `delaying changing the pillow cases by 3 days`
    overdue = parseInt(msg.overdue) - 3
}
else {
    string1 = `delaying ${string0[msg.slots.name]} by one week`
    overdue = parseInt(msg.overdue) - 7
}


if (overdue < -1) {
    string2 = `You now have ${overdue * -1} days until its due`
}
else if (overdue == -1) {
    string2 = `Its now due tomorrow`
}
else if (overdue == 0) {
    string2 = `Its now due today`
}
else if (overdue == 1) {
    string2 = `Its now one day overdue`
}
else if (overdue > 1) {
    string2 = `Its now ${overdue} days overdue`
}

msg.payload = `${string1} ${string2 || ''}`


return msg;
